extortion.description: The main principle of the work of the Nedvěd architects studio is the search for new spatial solutions for architectural interiors and exteriors in the public and private spheres with an emphasis on the harmonious connection of detail and the whole using selected materials, lights and colors. In our view, design and architecture are the bearers of a story in which the creator's vision is connected with the needs and visions of clients.-Projects (pdf, dwg)-Personal information-Other documents https://www.nedvedarchitekti.cz/
